ABIN PHILIP ANIL
abinanilphilip@gmail.com | +91 9497464373 | abinphilipanil.github.io/ | www.linkedin.com/in/abinphilipanila1b007

## Summary
I am a passionate Computer Science Engineering undergraduate with a strong interest in software development, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. I enjoy transforming ideas into real-world solutions through clean, efficient code and hands-on projects.

## Experience
- Tech Volunteer at Open Source Quest (January 2026 - Present)
  Gained hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure for AI and data science applications, learned end-to-end AI workflows, cloud deployment concepts, and ethical AI practices.
- Internship Trainee at Microsoft initiatives (May 2025 - June 2025)
  Gained hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure for AI and data science applications, learned end-to-end AI workflows, cloud deployment concepts, and ethical AI practices.
- Internship Trainee at TeckSaksham (February 2025 - March 2025)
  Participated in AI: Transformative Learning, a CSR initiative by Microsoft & SAP, implemented by Edunet Foundation, designed and implemented a Personal Fitness Tracker using Python.

## Projects
1. AI-based-ATS - An Applicant Tracking System is recruitment software that: Parses and scores resumes based on job requirements, Filters candidates using keyword matching, Ranks applicants before human review | Tech: Python
2. Password-generator | Tech: Python
3. To-Do-GUI | Tech: Python
4. csrf-scanner - A Python-based tool to scan web forms for missing CSRF protection, including a demo HTML page illustrating CSRF risks. | Tech: Python

## Skills
Azure, Python, Web Development, Supabase, Java, AI, Cloud Computing, Problem-solving, Adaptability, Teamwork, Communication, Microsoft Azure

## Education
- Computer Science and Engineering - Sree Buddha College of Engineering (2023 - 2027)
- Higher Secondary Education - GPHSS Kulanada (March 2021 - March 2023)
- High School - St.johns school keerukuzhy

- Coursera certificate on Introduction to AI
- Coursera certificate on Intro to Supabase
- Coursera certificate on Introduction to Generative AI
- Udemy Python Mastery: The Complete Web Programming Course.
- NPTEL certificate on Programming in Java
